description: Expanded GDELT (19 countries: Asia + USA/UK/CH/DE/FR/UAE). Aligns with Asia bulk span.
notes: Preferred: bash scripts/run_news_shock_gkg_expanded_fleet.sh ensure — starts all joined workers with lane split.
backfill lane: 2018-01 .. 2025-09 on 3 hosts; recent lane: 2025-09 .. 2026-07 on 2 hosts.
Outputs SCP to optiplex then land on Transcend via data_lake symlink. Keep Transcend mounted on optiplex.
Temp tarballs use SR_GDELT_TMP on Transcend (not NVMe).
